prose:
**TEMPO frontier orbital energies** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz`, calculation performed as a single point, geometry not optimized. SCF converged in 12 cycles.

The calculated HOMO energy is -6.3375439 eV, the LUMO energy is -2.4651235 eV, leading to a HOMO-LUMO gap of 3.8724203 eV.

This calculation was performed with the chemkit tool. The live log is written to a file similar to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2_qo4xd4/live.out` and the full JSON result to a path like `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2_qo4xd4/live.json`. The exact command line invocation was: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --mult 2 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp2_qo4xd4/live.json`.
